name: Seafood Creole
recipeIngredient: Fresh fish fillets, cut into 1-inch cubes, 1 lb
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil over medium heat in a large skillet. Gradually blend the flour, stirring constantly until it turns into a brown paste (be careful not to scorch).
2. Add hot water gradually and cook until thick and smooth.
3. Add shrimp, fish fillets, tomato sauce, chopped parsley, green bell pepper, garlic, bay leaves, salt, thyme, and cayenne pepper. Cover and simmer for 12 minutes.
4. Remove the bay leaves and lemon slice.
5. Serve spooned over hot cooked rice.
